title: Oil Slick Is Detected Off Kharg Island in the Persian Gulf
summary_full: The slick, captured in satellite images near Kharg Island in the Persian Gulf, has raised concerns about the condition of Iran’s oil infrastructure.
summary_public: The slick, captured in satellite images near Kharg Island in the Persian Gulf, has raised concerns about the condition of Iran’s oil infrastructure.

IR.label: negative
